_comment: Hooks: SessionEnd (Phase 2 background journaling) + SessionStart (boot-context injection, post-Phase-5 hardening). Merge the 'hooks' key below into ~/.claude/settings.json via the hook-install section of INSTALL.md, replacing <assistant-path> with this folder's absolute path. The command strings' embedded double quotes are intentional and must be kept — each hook command runs through a shell, and an unquoted path containing spaces (e.g. a folder under 'VSCODE MAIN') would otherwise be split into multiple arguments. This file itself is inert — nothing reads it at runtime.
